# AI Startup Impact

> AI Startup Impact is the premier platform for Indian AI news. Discover top artificial intelligence startups, funding, tools, and founder stories.

AI Startup Impact aggregates news, tools, metrics, funding data and founder stories for the AI ecosystem in India. 

## Structure
- Home: General news and comprehensive platform introduction.
- Funding Dashboard `/funding`: Tracks capital raised by AI companies in India.
- Directory `/tools`: Library of native AI tools developed by Indian founders.

## Mission
Our mission is to track, boost, and highlight the Indian artificial intelligence ecosystem, showcasing the impact that Indian companies have globally.
